Deployed integration partnerships with Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp — coordinating requirements, custom runtime configurations, and live production validations to drive **$14M+ business impact**.

Implemented **automated CI/CD pipelines** in collaboration with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle 25% and establishing repeatable release patterns for the robotics fleet.

Cut Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by deploying a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search surfaces to turn inbound signals into qualified pipeline.
